verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The great Sculptor began with a vision in His mind; He started out to create a masterpiece of all time. But His masterpiece fell, And His heart was torn in two; So He started out to build His masterpiece anew.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are the Masterpiece of the Word of God, We are His Chosen Ones, in Him we abide; We are the Blood of Christ by the Spirit dwelling within, We are His Masterpiece, created in Him.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He started with foundation, the patriarchs of old. He built the body by the Word, a wonder to behold; And last of all the Head came down, Perfection was complete; For He alone was the One who could be the Masterpiece.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When He looked upon Him, He was so inspired. He smote Him to make Him speak And bring forth His Bride; She's not another piece, just a part of Him. He's taken two thousand years Building a Masterpiece again.
